Net tick reading: the 14:00 one-tick recovery was not a wobble — it has confirmed as a durable regime. No new trades, no OPEN orders, strategy layer still silent.

hold_rationale: No numeric overrides changed this tick. (1) NO spec-hard trigger fired. Every threshold remains on its tolerance side of the fire line: book -0.025% (inside -1% by 97.5 bps), MAHABANK -5.77% (INSIDE -6% by 23 bps; -7% buffer 123 bps; -8% buffer 223 bps), BFSI 36.08% (inside 37% by 0.92 pp), HINDUNILVR -2.60% (inside -4% by 140 bps, improved). (2) The 14:00 ARMED CONDITIONAL specifically targeted at the 14:30 tick ('if silence 3h+ AND MAHABANK below -5.88% → elevate to conditional HIGH') FAILED its component test for the SECOND consecutive tick: silence leg TRUE (3h 47m), but MAHABANK leg FALSE (MAHABANK at -5.77%, 11 bps ABOVE -5.88% — plateaued, not re-degraded). The conditional elevation path continues to cleanly evaluate to 'do not elevate.' (3) Book recovery CONFIRMED as a regime, not a wobble — 2 consecutive ticks of +₹846 then +₹1,485 improvements have compressed the daily loss by 86%. Firing a lever on a recovering regime would be counter-directional. (4) MAHABANK likewise plateaued (0 bps) — neither re-degrading (which would arm trigger_e) nor recovering past -5.5% (which would drop composite HIGH to 1-of-3). Flat plateau is a neutral signal at the numeric-lever layer; no action indicated. (5) HINDUNILVR fully DE-ARMED: first recovery tick since 10:43 entry (+27 bps), buffer widened 113 → 140 bps, trajectory reversed. The 14:00 re-armed directional-widening watch no longer applies. (6) BFSI concentration nominally tightened 0.99 → 0.92 pp buffer, but the cause is AUBANK +80 bps MTM firming — a positive P&L phenomenon that mechanically increases sector %. The 13:30/14:00 spec's explicit MTM-only gate applies: do NOT fire min_confidence on this. (7) AUBANK triangle gain-leg is 9 bps from trip but even if it fires, the triangle is EFFECTIVELY CAPPED at 2-of-3 for this session — unacted leg is FALSE via today's 2 SELLs, and that flip is durable. Per 14:00 spec, 2-of-3 without unacted does not lever-fire. (8) Admission surface open for 3h 47m with no admission — tightening max_deployed_pct now would simulate strategy-layer activity by closing a door that is not being walked through; undoing the beneficial SELL → freed-cash → quality-gated-BUY regime for the sake of motion. (9) The composite HIGH meta-trigger direction continues to move FURTHER AWAY from elevation this tick (book leg +15.2 bps buffer, MAHABANK leg flat, silence leg hardening into strategy_reviewer territory) — tightening against a beneficially-moving vector would be contra-indicated. (10) Strategy silence past 3h is per spec a strategy_reviewer escalation flag, NOT a risk_monitor numeric lever — the 16:30 IST strategy_reviewer tick is the native escalation path. The 4h trip at 14:43:24 (13 min post-tick) would similarly require book and MAHABANK co-conditions to elevate, both currently FALSE. (11) Existing override stack (min_confidence 0.60, max_position_pct 0.15, max_deployed_pct 0.70, default_sl_pct 0.015, min_sl_pct 0.01, max_sl_pct 0.04) already gates every admission surface tightly; adding collateral knobs without a firing trigger would be theatrical and abandon the established 'tighten when spec fires, hold when it doesn't' discipline. Disciplined HOLD is the correct action. (12) SL-drift activity this tick shows the MODIFY layer is quietly re-engaging even while explicit SELL/BUY is silent — NESTLEIND/PNBHOUSING/AUBANK all showed correct-direction SL tightening this tick, a 3rd beneficial quiet-intervention tick in a row. This is a health signal, not a warning — another reason to hold and observe.
